hero.trialInfo: Free for farmers. No credit card required.

impact.title: Map once. Prove forever.

global.title: Works offline

impact.useCases: Farmers and cooperatives are already using Tracebud to:

compliance.title: Why this matters in 18 months
compliance.subtitle: Europe is requiring proof of where your crop came from. If you don't have it, you can't sell. Tracebud makes that proof portable and reusable.

useCases: Early Pilots Are Already Using Tracebud For:

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Built from the ground up to meet EU regulatory requirements with direct system integrations.

faq.title: Questions? We have answers.
faq.whenLaunch: When can I start using Tracebud?
faq.whenLaunchAnswer: We're testing with farmers and cooperatives now. Join the waitlist and we'll invite you when your region opens.
faq.whyCommoditiesAnswer: Coffee, cocoa, palm oil, rubber, soy, cattle, and timber. These are the 7 crops the EU is watching.
faq.howCostAnswer: Free for farmers. Cooperatives and exporters pay based on how many farmers they manage. Importers pay based on how many suppliers they track. You only pay for what you use.
faq.howLongAnswer: Once you sign up, farmers can start mapping immediately. Most cooperatives have their whole network mapped within a week. It works offline, so no downtime in the field.
faq.supportAnswer: We're here. Direct support from our team, 24/7 email, plus we do hands-on onboarding for cooperatives and exporters. You're not alone in this.
